conflict: Minjae prioritizes his sister's safety and informs Kwon, while Ina misreads intimacy as alignment.
consequence: Ina loses access, liquidity, and partnership; betrayal becomes structural, not merely emotional.
must_land_beats: Ina shares leak architecture with Minjae in confidence.
Minjae quietly alerts Kwon to buy time for his family.
Ina's accounts are frozen and devices wiped.
Confrontation ends with mutual accusation and unresolved grief.
objective: Recruit Minjae into leak logistics and preserve operational viability.
